nasb.text: He makes wars to cease to the end of the earth; He breaks the bow and cuts the spear in two; He burns the chariots with fire.

esv.text: He makes wars cease to the end of the earth; he breaks the bow and shatters the spear; he burns the chariots with fire.

cnv.text: 他使戰爭止息，直到地極； 他把弓折毀，把矛砍斷， 把戰車用火焚燒。

ccb.text: 祂平息天下的战争， 祂断弓、折枪、烧毁盾牌。

csbs.text: 他使战争终止，直到地极； 他打断弓、砍断矛， 用烈火烧掉战车。
